name: SCC_CreateServiceDetailReq_DIN
title: SCC_CreateServiceDetailReq_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateServiceDetailReq_DIN ( byte SessionID[], dword ServiceId )
description: Creates a Service Detail Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
